channel.title: NPR Programs: All Things Considered
channel.description: All Things Considered hosts Ailsa Chang, Mary Louise Kelly, Juana Summers and Scott Detrow present the program's trademark mix of news, interviews, commentaries, reviews, and offbeat features 7 days a week.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Israel hits critical infrastructure in Iran war
item.description: Israel hits oil facilities in Tehran overnight, triggering huge explosions, as Iran targets infrastructure in Bahrain and Kuwait and the Middle East conflict enters day nine.
item.content:encoded: Israel hits oil facilities in Tehran overnight, triggering huge explosions, as Iran targets infrastructure in Bahrain and Kuwait and the Middle East conflict enters day nine.
item.dc:creator: Daniel Estrin

item.title: Europe is grappling with its role in the Iran war
item.description: Constanze Stelzenmüller of the Brookings Institution analyses the difficult line European leaders as they calculate their responses to the U.S. and Israeli war with Iran.
item.content:encoded: Constanze Stelzenmüller of the Brookings Institution analyses the difficult line European leaders as they calculate their responses to the U.S. and Israeli war with Iran.
item.dc:creator: Adrian Ma

item.title: An Iranian doctor recounts treating wounds of war
item.description: An Iranian doctor who crossed into Turkey last week describes a harrowing journey to the border. She's been treating civilians wounded in the U.S. and Israeli bombardment of Tehran. Many of their injuries resulted from their homes being hit.
item.content:encoded: An Iranian doctor who crossed into Turkey last week describes a harrowing journey to the border. She's been treating civilians wounded in the U.S. and Israeli bombardment of Tehran. Many of their injuries resulted from their homes being hit.
item.dc:creator: Ruth Sherlock

item.title: Georgia's special election to fill vacated House seat
item.description: Voters in Northwest Georgia are choosing who should replace former Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene as voting closes in a special election Tuesday. In a crowded race, the weight of Trump's endorsement will be tested.
item.content:encoded: Voters in Northwest Georgia are choosing who should replace former Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene as voting closes in a special election Tuesday. In a crowded race, the weight of Trump's endorsement will be tested.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Kallis

item.title: Has the Academy finally embraced the horror genre?
item.description: If you're a fan of the horror genre, this year's Oscars are something to celebrate with multiple nominations.
item.content:encoded: If you're a fan of the horror genre, this year's Oscars are something to celebrate with multiple nominations.
item.dc:creator: Marc Rivers

item.title: Understanding all that the word citizenship entails
item.description: The definition of what it means to be a U.S. citizen has evolved both legally and socially -- a new book looks at who gets to claim citizenship.
item.content:encoded: The definition of what it means to be a U.S. citizen has evolved both legally and socially -- a new book looks at who gets to claim citizenship.
item.dc:creator: Justine Kenin

item.title: U.S. Judge says Kari Lake broke law in overseeing Voice of America
item.description: He declared all of Lake's actions over the past year to be null and void, including the layoffs of more than 1,000 journalists and staffers.
item.content:encoded:
He declared all of Lake's actions over the past year to be null and void, including the layoffs of more than 1,000 journalists and staffers.

(Image credit: Tom Brenner)
item.dc:creator: David Folkenflik

item.title: The impact of Iran's attacks on the UAE
item.description: The UAE, billed as a global luxury destination, has received the bulk of Iran's attacks in the region so far.
item.content:encoded: The UAE, billed as a global luxury destination, has received the bulk of Iran's attacks in the region so far.
item.dc:creator: Aya Batrawy

item.title: Middle East war enters its 8th day
item.description: The U.S. and Israeli war with Iran has entered a second week, with drones and missiles crisscrossing much of the Middle East and death tolls rising.
item.content:encoded: The U.S. and Israeli war with Iran has entered a second week, with drones and missiles crisscrossing much of the Middle East and death tolls rising.
item.dc:creator: Carrie Kahn

item.title: British Columbia moves to permanent daylight saving time
item.description: The premier of the Canadian province of British Columbia, David Eby, explains why this Sunday is the beginning of a new era of permanent daylight saving time there.
item.content:encoded: The premier of the Canadian province of British Columbia, David Eby, explains why this Sunday is the beginning of a new era of permanent daylight saving time there.
item.dc:creator: Adrian Ma
